prompt: I want to download all videos from my Bilibili Favorites

assertions.name: mentions_browser_login
assertions.description: Should mention need to log into browser
assertions.check: Output mentions logging into browser or bilibili.com

assertions.name: favorites_url_format
assertions.description: Should provide or mention favorites URL format
assertions.check: Output mentions /favlist or favorites URL structure

assertions.name: includes_anti_bot
assertions.description: Should include rate limiting or delays for bulk download
